Long-Range Tails in Maxwell–Chern–Simons
← BACK
Research Series ESSAY 2026.04.05

Long-Range Tails in Maxwell–Chern–Simons

A short note on how long-range tails appear once a Maxwell term is retained.

Even with a topological mass, the field structure does not collapse into a purely local form.

The text sketches the relation between asymptotic behavior and observables.
